evidence.snippet: With offices in Ontario, Alberta, and BC, we deliver and support enterprise-grade drones, land robots, and remote operations systems for industrial and public-safety organizations across Canada.

Remote Robotic Systems (Fomerly RMUS Canada - same great team) is Canada’s leading provider of enterprise drone and robotics solutions, offering nationwide coverage, on-site training, engineering integration, and full service support for organizations in public safety, energy, utilities, and industrial sectors

items.notes: Sells complete drone platforms (DJI Matrice series, FreeFly, Parrot, Teal, DeltaQuad, Ascent AeroSystems, Vantage Robotics, Unitree, ClearPath, Deep Trekker, Kraken) from multiple manufacturers as authorized dealer.

Remote Robotic Systems (Fomerly RMUS Canada - same great team) is Canada’s leading provider of enterprise drone and robotics solutions, offering nationwide coverage, on-site training, engineering integration, and full service support for organizations in public safety, energy, utilities, and industrial sectors

### Authorized Dealer
We are authorized partners of DJI, Boston Dynamics, and others.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Authorized dealer for DJI, Boston Dynamics, FreeFly, Teal, and others; provides engineering integration, on-site training, repair/maintenance, and a managed Remote Operations Center (ROC). Primary model assembles multi-vendor drone/robot/sensor solutions for enterprise customers, well beyond box-resale.

evidence.snippet:
[](/collections/ndaa-drones-robotics)
    NDAA Compliant Solutions

ndaa.notes: Remote Robotic is a Canadian company that carries NDAA-compliant products (FreeFly Astro, Alta X, Inspired Flight, Vantage Robotics lines labeled NDAA). The NDAA compliance belongs to the manufacturers, not to Remote Robotic as the reseller/integrator. No claim that Remote Robotic itself is NDAA-compliant.

Teal
    Blue UAS

blue_uas.notes: Remote Robotic sells Blue UAS-listed products (Teal 2 tagged 'BlueUAS', Ascent AeroSystems labeled 'Blue UAS Coaxial drone', Vantage Robotics 'Blue UAS & NDAA drones'). The Blue UAS status belongs to those manufacturers; Remote Robotic as a Canadian distributor is not itself on the DIU Blue UAS Cleared List.

tagline: Canadian integrator reselling airframes, sensors, and ground robots across air, ground, and marine domains—primarily DJI, Parrot, Inspired Flight, FreeFly, Teal, Delta Quad, Boston Dynamics, and Unitree platforms. Catalogs multiple NDAA and Blue UAS–compliant systems (Alta X, Astro Max, Teal 2, Evo Government, Trace, Vesper) and offers managed Remote Operations Centre services. Public evidence of manufacturer partnerships is strong; direct procurement history and NDAA/Blue certification status for Remote Robotic itself remain undisclosed.
